stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning oxygen on board of passenger transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: Portable oxygen bottles are primarily intended for use in case the chemical oxygen generators fail.
options.b: Lavatories also have an oxygen drop out system to protect passengers in case of decompression.
options.c: A chemical oxygen generator is able to provide oxygen for at least one hour.
options.d: After being activated a chemical oxygen generator does not produce any heat.
